hero.title: Craft Your
hero.subtitle: From grape selection to label design, create a wine that is uniquely yours. Handcrafted in prestigious vineyards, delivered worldwide.

philosophy.title: Where Tradition
philosophy.description: At Vintedge, we believe that wine is more than a beverage—it's a canvas for self-expression. Our master sommeliers work with you to craft a wine that reflects your unique palate, style, and story.

step1.title: Select Your Wine
step1.description: Choose from our curated selection of premium varietals from renowned vineyards worldwide.

step2.title: Design Your Label
step2.description: Create a bespoke label with our intuitive editor. Upload your artwork or use our AI assistant.

step3.title: Customize Packaging
step3.description: Select bottle shape, cork type, capsule color, and premium gift packaging options.

step4.title: Worldwide Delivery
step4.description: Your custom wine is carefully packaged and shipped to your doorstep anywhere in the world.

testimonials.quote1: The level of customization is extraordinary. My wedding wine was exactly what I envisioned—elegant, personal, and absolutely delicious.
testimonials.quote2: Vintedge transformed our corporate gifting. Our clients were genuinely impressed by the attention to detail and quality.
testimonials.quote3: From selection to delivery, every step was seamless. The AI label designer helped me create something truly unique.

cta.title: Ready to Create
cta.description: Join thousands of wine enthusiasts who have discovered the art of personalized wine. Your signature vintage awaits.

footer.tagline: Crafting bespoke wine experiences for discerning palates worldwide. Every bottle tells your unique story.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Vintedge. All rights reserved. Must be 21+ to purchase.

newsletter.title: Join Our Community
newsletter.description: Receive exclusive offers and pairing tips.
